insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rise next period — App Total New Subs +7.4%, led by YCP.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +7.4% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User -4.0%, App Total Install -3.5%; Δ +11.1pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. The lift is concentrated in YCP (+9.7%); YMK is +6.3%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-04 vs 06-27 = -0.5% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-27 vs 06-20 = -5.6% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+9.7% vs upstream -7.1%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +9.7% vs upstream -7.1% (conversion surging); YMK +6.3% vs upstream -1.2% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue up across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is up across every app (All App +4.0%, YMK +2.8%, YCP +6.9%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.

insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -4.3% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -1.5%, App Total Install -2.4%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = +11.4% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = +7.4% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Funnel holding — New Subs conversion consistent across apps.
insights.body: New Subs is converting in line with upstream across every app (within ±5pp).

insights.title: App split — App Total Revenue +11.4% concentrated in YCP — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Revenue +11.4% is uneven by app (All App +11.4%, YMK +10.7%, YCP +16.2%) — driven mainly by YCP, not a platform-wide shift.
